members_flagged_as_false_positive: 社会证明的从众阈值
技术采用的跨越鸿沟
费托合成原位相重构
members_flagged_reason: Preisach hysteresis specifically requires a continuous spectrum of independent two-state hysterons with distributed (α,β) coercivities — this is what gives the wiping-out and congruency properties. (1) 社会证明的从众阈值/技术采用跨越鸿沟 are Granovetter threshold cascades on a SINGLE collective state variable, not a Preisach-type distributed-hysteron memory; they exhibit one-shot tipping, not the continuous return-point memory characteristic of Preisach. (2) 费托合成原位相重构 is a catalytic surface phase reconstruction governed by Gibbs free energy minimization (first-order Maxwell construction), not by an ensemble of independent bistable units. They share 'has a loop' surface phenomenology but mechanism differs.

negative_examples.phenomenon: Bouc-Wen rate-independent friction in MEMS resonators
negative_examples.reason: rate-independent loop looks Preisach but Bouc-Wen is a single-state-variable phenomenological model, not a hysteron ensemble; lacks return-point memory
first-order transition with surface tension barrier; hysteresis width set by classical nucleation theory not a (α,β) distribution

negative_examples.phenomenon: shape memory alloy stress-strain loop under cyclic loading
negative_examples.reason: martensite-austenite transformation IS first-order but driven by elastic strain energy + transformation strain compatibility, not by independent hysterons — congruency property typically violated
single hysteron — superficially Preisach-like but degenerate to one element, not the ensemble that gives Preisach its predictive power

split_suggestion: Split into (a) Preisach-Mayergoyz distributed hysteron class (magnetism, soil-moisture retention, possibly DeFi liquidation cycles) — keeps the ∫∫μ(α,β) machinery; (b) Maxwell first-order transition with simple hysteresis (gelation, traffic phase transition, liquefaction) — uses Landau φ⁴ or Ginzburg-Landau free energy.
notes: The hub 热固性树脂凝胶点渗流相变 is itself percolation (Flory-Stockmayer p_c=2/(f-1)), not hysteresis at all — this is a structural mis-rooting. Class should probably be re-rooted on magnetism or soil-moisture.

members_flagged_as_false_positive: 果胶凝胶网络
淀粉糊化
形状记忆合金马氏体逆变
热障涂层的热应力分岔
members_flagged_reason: Scheffer fold-bifurcation class is characterized by saddle-node bifurcation in a single slow variable with positive feedback giving bistability + critical slowing down. (1) 果胶凝胶/淀粉糊化 are percolation-type gelation transitions (Flory-Stockmayer), not saddle-node fold — they are continuous (second-order) network connectivity transitions. (2) 形状记忆合金马氏体逆变 is a martensitic first-order transition driven by elastic+transformation strain compatibility, not by an ecological-type slow-fast bistability; the mathematical form is Ginzburg-Landau φ⁶ with strain coupling, not r-bx+x²/(h²+x²). (3) 热障涂层热应力分岔 is a buckling/delamination instability, not a bistable attractor flip.

negative_examples.reason: Hopf bifurcation not saddle-node — limit cycle birth, not bistable jump

negative_examples.phenomenon: buckling of an axially loaded column (Euler instability)
negative_examples.reason: pitchfork bifurcation with mirror symmetry, not fold; no hysteresis without imperfection
looks like a sudden state flip but driven by vapor-film thermal resistance feedback that is hydrodynamic, not an ecological fold normal form

negative_examples.phenomenon: Allee-effect population extinction at low density
negative_examples.reason: DOES involve fold geometrically but mechanism is demographic stochasticity + reproduction nonlinearity, EWS signals are weaker — borderline, often misclassified

notes: Core members (湖泊富营养化, 绿色撒哈拉, 蛋白质相分离, 肿瘤铁死亡, 对乙酰氨基酚毒性) are solid — all show saddle-node geometry with explicit positive feedback. Recommend pruning the cooking-science and metallurgy outliers, then KEEP.

members_flagged_as_false_positive: 旁观者效应
GPS路径再分配
地震静态应力触发
members_flagged_reason: Motter-Lai cascade requires: (a) network-distributed load, (b) capacity-bounded nodes, (c) load REDISTRIBUTION after failure (conservation), (d) threshold-triggered secondary failures. (1) 旁观者效应 is diffusion of responsibility — load doesn't redistribute deterministically and there is no node 'failure' in the M-L sense; it is a coordination/Bayesian game. (2) GPS路径再分配 is congestion game with Wardrop equilibrium reassignment — flow re-routing without node-knockout cascades. (3) 地震静态应力触发 (Coulomb stress transfer) shares the redistribution math but the mechanism is elastic stress diffusion through a continuous medium with rate-and-state friction, NOT load shedding on a discrete network; it belongs in self-organized criticality / Olami-Feder-Christensen class.

negative_examples.reason: SOC + percolation, not load redistribution — trees burn deterministically once ignited, no capacity buffer
stochastic infection probability per contact, no load conservation; recovery process introduces different topology
neuron firing redistributes synaptic charge but each neuron has integrate-and-fire dynamics with leak — closer to branching process at criticality than M-L
preferential attachment + homophily drive the cascade; no capacity constraint, no load shedding

merge_with: Could absorb motter_lai_network_cascade_social as same class (see merge recommendation there)
notes: Strong core: 电网连锁故障, 建筑结构倒塌, 闪崩流动性螺旋, 银行挤兑/对手方传染, DeFi清算. These share the explicit Eisenberg-Noe / Motter-Lai equation. Prune the three flagged outliers.

members_flagged_as_false_positive: 冰期终结的非线性触发

They are the SAME universality class. 胰岛素信号通路与发育时序门控 is more accurately a timing/dose-response gradient with feedforward loops (IGF signaling cascade has multiple feedforwards), not a clean bistable toggle — Hill coefficient effectively n≈1.5 in most measured cases.

members_flagged_as_false_positive: 合同不完全性与敲竹杠
时间不一致性问题
捆绑让步策略
members_flagged_reason: Schelling credible-commitment is a GAME-THEORETIC equilibrium-selection phenomenon, not a dynamical universality class. The shared 'equation' (payoff(commit) > payoff(flexible) iff sunk_cost > defection_gain) is a static inequality, not a scaling law or critical exponent. (1) 时间不一致性 is the Kydland-Prescott problem about policy reoptimization, distinct from Schelling commitment (no sunk cost device needed). (2) 合同不完全性敲竹杠 is the Hart-Moore holdup problem driven by ex-post bargaining inefficiency, not commitment. (3) 捆绑让步 is multi-issue Nash bargaining linkage. These all live under 'strategic commitment' as a topic, but they don't share scaling exponents, critical points, or dynamical equations. This is taxonomy of game-theory concepts, not universality class.

negative_examples.phenomenon: Akerlof gift exchange in labor markets
negative_examples.reason: involves reciprocity and norms not commitment devices
looks like commitment but is reputation accumulation in repeated game, different mechanism
classic Schelling example BUT specific operational form differs from generic 'sunk_cost > defection_gain' — actually pre-commits to specific contingent action
stability concept, not commitment

split_suggestion: Disaggregate into 4 separate game-theoretic taxa: (a) commitment with sunk costs, (b) time-inconsistency / dynamic reoptimization, (c) holdup / specific investment, (d) issue linkage / log-rolling. None of these are universality classes in the physics sense.
notes: This class fails the test 'shared equation form + shared scaling exponents + shared critical mechanism'. It is a topical cluster of related game-theoretic concepts. The cluster has the LOWEST avg_edge_score (5.575) in V4 — embeddings noticed it's weak.

members_flagged_as_false_positive: 巨灾债券的极端事件对冲
巨灾衍生品的极端事件定价
高层建筑风荷载的极值分布
种子散布距离尾巴
members_flagged_reason: EVT (Fisher-Tippett-Gnedenko + Pickands-Balkema-de Haan) is a STATISTICAL LIMIT THEOREM, analogous to CLT — it tells you that IF X_i are iid with regularly varying tail, THEN max(X_i) converges to GEV. It is NOT a universality class in the dynamical/critical-phenomena sense; it has no 'shared mechanism' beyond 'tails are regularly varying'. Every member of this class shares a statistical descriptor (GEV/GPD fit), not a generating mechanism. Same way 'CLT class' isn't a universality class even though means converge to Normal across wildly different processes. (1) 种子散布距离尾巴 generating mechanism = Lévy flight wind transport. (2) 巨灾衍生品 = compound Poisson catastrophe arrival times. (3) 风荷载 = Davenport spectrum + ABL turbulence. These have ZERO mechanistic overlap.

negative_examples.reason: also has heavy tails (Mandelbrot α≈3), would 'fit' here, but mechanism is volatility clustering + jumps, totally different from Lévy or Poisson
heavy-tailed but generated by Gibrat-like growth, fundamentally different from EVT max-statistics
exponential in magnitude = power-law in seismic moment, but mechanism is brittle fracture statistics not extremes of iid sequence
fit by power law with exponent ≈3/2 from SOC, completely different dynamical origin

split_suggestion: Demote to 'statistical regularity' rather than universality class. Keep as a useful catalog of phenomena with heavy tails, but don't claim shared dynamics.
notes: This is exactly the 'extreme value' false-confidence case the V4 critique was looking for. Confidence high because the LLM auto-curator marked it 'high' but applied wrong criterion (shared distributional form ≠ shared mechanism). Recommend REJECT or relabel as Statistical-Limit-Theorem category.

members_flagged_reason: All three members (灭绝债务, 厄尔尼诺延迟振子, 永冻土甲烷延迟反馈) share genuine delay-differential structure dx/dt = f(x(t-τ)) - μ·x(t) with documented Hopf bifurcation at τ_c. ENSO (Suarez-Schopf delayed oscillator), permafrost methane (carbon-climate feedback DDE), and extinction debt (Tilman habitat-loss DDE) all have well-published explicit DDE models. The class is coherent.

members_flagged_as_false_positive: 参考点适应的享乐跑步机
members_flagged_reason: LIF threshold class requires: continuous integrator + leak + threshold-crossing event + RESET. (1) Piezo1 mechanical channel does have threshold-gating but no reset in the LIF sense — channel opens then closes by gating kinetics, not integrate-fire-reset; mechanism is mechanosensitive conformational change. (2) Token bucket rate limiter is a true LIF-isomorph (engineered for this purpose). (3) 享乐跑步机 hedonic adaptation — the 'leak' (return to setpoint) is real but there is no DISCRETE FIRING EVENT with reset; subjective wellbeing is continuous-valued throughout. Mechanism is psychological adaptation (Helson 1947), not integrate-and-fire. The Lapicque neuron analogy is decorative.

members_flagged_as_false_positive: 朋友圈信息的回声室效应

(1) 沉默螺旋 (Noelle-Neumann) is about minority-opinion silencing under PERCEIVED majority — mechanism is conformity pressure + selective expression, NOT hidden quality + adverse selection. No information asymmetry about quality; everyone observes opinions. (2) 回声室 / 信息茧房 are recommender-system feedback loops driven by engagement optimization — they reduce diversity but mechanism is filter-bubble selection on user side + algorithmic optimization, NOT seller-buyer information asymmetry. Surface similarity: 'diversity decreases over time'. Mechanism differs.

members_flagged_as_false_positive: 网络安全险的相关性难题

(3) Cyber-insurance correlation problem is driven by software-monoculture correlation (CrowdStrike-style single-point) — scale-free might describe attack-vector topology, but core insurance issue is shared-vulnerability not network percolation per se.

members_flagged_as_false_positive: 主动管理与指数化的流动性外部性

The active-vs-index management liquidity externality, by contrast, is a CONTINUOUS price-impact feedback (Pedersen-style funding liquidity), not a connectivity percolation — order parameter and scaling exponents don't apply.

The label 'reaction_diffusion' is slightly misleading because there's NO nonlinear reaction — it's pure linear screening/diffusion with degradation (modified Helmholtz). Class is mechanistically uniform.

members_flagged_as_false_positive: 发电机组启停的马尔可夫模型
members_flagged_reason: First-order Markov property is a VERY GENERIC statistical structure that any memoryless or near-memoryless process exhibits — like CLT and EVT, it is a limit theorem (the property of being well-approximated by a Markov chain is preserved across an enormous diversity of mechanisms). Calling this a universality class is a category error: ALL of (a) DNA methylation inheritance via DNMT1, (b) X-inactivation random choice + clonal maintenance, (c) generator on/off scheduling have NOTHING in common mechanistically beyond 'memoryless one-step transitions'. DNA methylation mechanism = enzymatic copying with substrate preference. X-inactivation = bistable Xist/Tsix regulatory loop. Generator scheduling = unit-commitment optimization. The shared π=πP equation is a statistical descriptor, not a mechanism.

negative_examples.reason: Markov chain, would 'fit' — mechanism is independent inter-arrival times, very different from epigenetic inheritance
Markovian by construction — would fit, totally different physics
Markov chain on web graph, different application
Markovian descriptor, no shared mechanism with anything else here
rating transitions modeled as Markov — empirically NOT Markov (path-dependent), but commonly assumed; trivially fits

split_suggestion: Demote to 'statistical-descriptor class' analogous to extreme_value_tail_class. Keep DNA methylation in epigenetic-inheritance class (with X-inactivation if mechanism matches). Move generator scheduling out entirely.
notes: Auto-curated 'high' but using wrong criterion (shared descriptor vs shared mechanism). Companion to EVT class — both are statistical-limit-theorem categories miscategorized as universality classes. EXTRA skepticism warranted as per task prompt.

members_flagged_reason: All three members (高层建筑风振 with TMD, 电力系统小信号振荡 with PSS, 电力系统暂态稳定) genuinely reduce to M·ẍ + C·ẋ + K·x = F(t) in their respective small-amplitude limits. The duality TMD↔PSS (passive vs active damping) is well-established in control theory. ω₀ and ζ are real shared scaling parameters; the resonance peak Q = 1/(2ζ) is a universal invariant.

notes: Clean linear class. The widest possible interpretation (any system reducible to M-C-K) would absorb LCR circuits, MEMS resonators, atomic spectroscopy linewidths — class is very broad but conceptually rigorous. Could expand with more cross-domain examples.

members_flagged_as_false_positive: 新兴市场传染的多米诺效应
members_flagged_reason: SIR contagion requires explicit: (a) susceptible → infected → recovered/removed progression, (b) recovery rate γ > 0, (c) reinfection forbidden, (d) basic reproduction R₀ = β⟨k⟩/γ governing threshold. (1) CDS credit cascade and OTC counterparty exposure are typically MODELED with SIR-like equations but the underlying mechanism is balance-sheet contagion (Eisenberg-Noe clearing) — there is no 'recovery' analog; once defaulted, node stays defaulted. So really SI or M-L cascade, not SIR. (2) Emerging-market crisis contagion (Mexico 1994, Asia 1997, etc.) has 'recovery' (countries do recover) but mechanism is balance-of-payments + capital-flight feedback, not pairwise infection with constant β; β is hugely state-dependent. SIR is a surface fit, not a mechanism.

negative_examples.reason: true SIR/SEIR mechanism — eligible, surprisingly absent
ISR (Ignorant-Spreader-Stifler), recovery happens but mechanism differs from disease (spreaders quit when they encounter informed)
SIR-like with 'recovery' = saturation/fatigue — eligible, missing
DIFFERENT — no permanent immunity; reinfection allowed; different attractor (endemic equilibrium)
looks SIR-like for cascades but mechanism is intensity-driven self-excitation without compartments
logistic adoption with imitation+innovation, no recovery — SI not SIR

split_suggestion: Split into (a) true SIR with recovery (epidemics, rumor with stifling, marketing-fatigue) — needs R₀, γ; (b) financial cascade with NO recovery (already in motter_lai_network_cascade class). Then this class becomes a true SIR class. Without split, this class conflates SIR with SI/M-L.
